title: Safe-Word Vault
description: Set a household safe word so family can confirm they're speaking to the real you — not a scammer. Anyone who calls claiming an emergency should know this word.

set.heading: Set safe word
set.body: Choose a word only your family would know. It is never stored in readable form or shown again.
set.label: New safe word

errors.tooShort: Safe word must be at least 3 characters.

verify.heading: Verify safe word
verify.body: Ask the caller for the safe word and check it here.
verify.label: Word given by caller

errors.notSetYet: No safe word set yet — set one first.
